title: Lack of Data Classification and Access Controls
description: Without knowing the data classification scheme or the implemented access controls, sensitive data could be exposed to unauthorized users. This includes both personally identifiable information (PII) and potentially confidential business data.  Attackers could exploit misconfigured access controls or vulnerabilities to gain access to sensitive information.
attack_vector: Exploitation of misconfigured access controls, vulnerabilities in the application code that expose sensitive data, or unauthorized access through compromised user accounts.
mitigations: Implement a data classification scheme to identify and categorize sensitive data.
Enforce the principle of least privilege, granting users only the minimum necessary access rights.
Regularly audit access controls and user permissions.
